sections.paragraph:
κλῖμαξ, ακος, ἡ (s. κλίνω; Hom.+) ladder, flight of stairs Ox 840, 26.—DELG s.v. κλίνω.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

Ox Ox = POxy, but refers to fragments of documents esp. relating to the lexical data base—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 549
